name: WeChatPadPro
description: OpenClaw channel plugin for WeChatPadPro / WeChatPadProMax

adminKey.description: WeChatPadPro admin key (required for WS mode)

port.description: WeChatPadPro server port (default 8062 for MAX, 8080 for standard)

authKey.description: Pre-generated auth key for standard WCPP (optional, auto-generates if not set)

authcode.description: WeChatPadProMAX authcode (used for /api/* endpoints, enables sync mode automatically)

wxid.description: WeChat ID after login (optional, persisted automatically)

syncMode.description: Message sync mode: 'ws' = WebSocket (standard WCPP), 'sync' = HTTP polling (WCPP MAX). Auto-detected from authcode.

allowFrom.description: List of wxid allowed to DM the bot

replyWithMention.description: In group chats, prefix reply with @sender (default: false)

proxy.description: Proxy for login QR code (e.g. socks5://user:pass@host:port)

readOnly.description: Receive-only mode — no sending, for account stability during initial period (default: false)

passRevokemsg.description: Also pass through revokemsg from MsgType 10002 (default: true)

maxMessageAge.description: Max message age in seconds — drop older messages (default: 180)
